overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a stormy coastal landscape. The character traverses stone ruins by the sea, follows a walled path, and continues through open grassland toward a distant forest while heavy rain and storm clouds create a dark, atmospheric mood.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal ruins toward the stone pathway, glancing at the shipwreck to the right

entered.detail: weathered stone walls and foundations of ancient coastal structures
large wooden ship remains with broken masts tilted in the water
irregular stone paving forming a walkway along the coast
dark choppy water visible beyond the ruins
leafless gnarled trees silhouetted against the storm sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy coastal scene with stone ruins and a wooden shipwreck visible to the right. The character walks along a cobblestone path beside the sea, passing between low stone walls as rain begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone walled coastal path with view of tower

events.description: exits open coastal ruins into walled stone pathway
tower structure becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walled path as the ground transitions from cobblestone to dirt, heading toward the distant tower

notable_agents.action: birds flying overhead against the storm clouds

entered.detail: low stone walls lining both sides of the path
tall stone tower visible on a distant hill

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a walled stone corridor with the sea no longer visible. The path surface mixes cobblestone and dirt as a tall tower becomes visible on the horizon ahead. Birds fly overhead in the stormy sky.

events.description: exits walled path into open grassland with tower on hill ahead
path curves slightly left passing the tower hill

agents.ego_description: walking through open terrain toward the tower, passing it on the left side as the path continues inland

entered.detail: rolling green hills covered in grass and low vegetation
scattered evergreen trees on the horizon
unpaved muddy path cutting through the grassland

segments.scene_description: Leaving the walled path, the scene opens into wide grassland with the tower prominent on a hill ahead. The character approaches and passes the tower, which moves to the left, while the terrain becomes more open and hilly with scattered pine trees.

events.description: tower passes out of view behind, dense forest becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt trail toward the distant forested hills, maintaining steady pace through the storm

entered.detail: dark thick woodland covering the distant hills
undulating terrain stretching toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: With the tower now behind, the character traverses open rolling hills toward a dense forest visible in the distance. The storm continues with heavy rain as the path leads deeper into the wilderness landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy coastal region that gradually transitions into a wild, hilly interior. It begins along a cobblestone path beside the sea, passing stone ruins and a wooden shipwreck as rain starts to fall. As the character moves forward, the open coast gives way to a narrow walled stone corridor where the sea disappears from view and a tall tower emerges on the horizon beneath a sky filled with flying birds. The scene then expands into wide, rain-swept grasslands as the character passes the tower on a hill, with the terrain shifting toward open slopes dotted with scattered pine trees. Finally, the camera follows the path across rolling hills, leaving the tower behind and heading deeper into the wilderness toward a dense, distant forest under the heavy storm.
